modules.title: Today's Weather
modules.summary: Partly cloudy with patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest. Light winds with daytime maximum around 20°C.

modules.title: Fire Danger & Firepit Safety
modules.summary: Fire danger is Moderate today. Campfires and firepits are ALLOWED, but strict safety requirements apply. You are currently within the Restricted Burning Period (Autumn: 15 March – 12 May). A Permit to Burn is required if you intend to burn.

metrics.label: Solid Fuel BBQ & Pizza Ovens Allowed

bullet_points: 3-meter clearance of all flammable material required
Adult must be in attendance at all times
Reliable water supply must be on hand
Contact Fire Control Officer or Shire Rangers before lighting to confirm current conditions

modules.title: This Week's Bin Collection
modules.summary: Green FOGO (organic waste) goes out every week. Check below for your alternating fortnightly bin.

metrics.label: Alternating Fortnightly
metrics.value: Unable to determine—no current execution date provided

bullet_points: Green FOGO bin: Always goes out
Yellow Recyclables and Red Landfill bins alternate weekly
To determine this week's alternating bin, calculate weeks elapsed since anchor date and apply even/odd rule
